Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Mordekaiser has higher base stats and burst at level 3+. His E pull is devastating. You can't fight his all-in early.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: His E pull — move perpendicular when he casts. Stay at range to avoid his gravity zone.
Mordekaiser.early_game: Play safe and farm. Mordekaiser outbursts you early. Avoid extended trades.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: Your burst and mobility improve. Look for side lane opportunities. Avoid grouped fights.
Mordekaiser.late_game: You're a better split pusher. His ult is dangerous grouped. Never let him ult you in teamfights.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Survive early. Roam and split push. Use your mobility to avoid his ult.
Mordekaiser.scaling: Even — both scale as split pushers with different win conditions.
Mordekaiser.positioning: Stay at range to minimize E pull. Don't extend into river.

Renekton.trading_pattern: Renekton's empowered abilities with Fury outburst you early. His W stun is devastating. Play around Fury cycles.
Renekton.ability_to_dodge: His empowered W stun — move perpendicular to avoid. If stunned, he combos you.
Renekton.early_game: Renekton's Fury cycles are too strong. Play safe and farm. Avoid fighting at level 3.
Renekton.mid_game: Your split push improves. Look for side lane opportunities. Avoid grouped fights.
Renekton.late_game: You're a better split pusher late. His early advantage diminishes.
Renekton.win_condition: Survive early. Roam and split push. Avoid grouped fights.
Renekton.scaling: You outscale late — Renekton is early-game focused.
Renekton.positioning: Move perpendicular to his W. Trade when his Fury is low.

Sett.trading_pattern: Sett's tankiness and W all-in are oppressive. His grit slam burst is devastating. You can't fight his all-in early.
Sett.ability_to_dodge: His W grit slam — move away when he builds grit. It stuns and deals massive damage.
Sett.early_game: Sett's all-in is too strong early. Play safe and farm. Avoid extended trades.
Sett.mid_game: Your burst improves. Look for combo opportunities. Avoid grouped fights.
Sett.late_game: You're a better split pusher. His tankiness is still relevant.
Sett.win_condition: Survive early. Roam and split push. Avoid grouped fights.
Sett.scaling: You outscale late — Sett is early-game focused.
Sett.positioning: Move away when his grit builds. Trade when W is down.

Jax.trading_pattern: Jax Q-AA burst wins short trades. His E counter-strike stun is devastating. Trade when his E is down.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: His E counter-strike — back away when he jumps. He stuns if counter triggers.
Jax.early_game: Trade short when his E is down. Your combo is strong early.
Jax.mid_game: His items help him scale. Your split push is strong. Avoid grouped fights.
Jax.late_game: He outscales as a duelist. You're a split pusher. Never 1v1 him late.
Jax.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Avoid his 1v1.
Jax.scaling: Jax outscales as a duelist. You're a split pusher.
Jax.positioning: Trade when his E is down. Don't let him scale.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is tanky but low damage. Your burst is stronger. Look for combo windows.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: His E shockwave — move away. It reduces armor but doesn't prevent your combos.
Malphite.early_game: Trade hard with your Q combos. Malphite scales into a teamfight god. Dominate early.
Malphite.mid_game: His R engage is powerful. Look for side lane opportunities. Avoid grouped fights.
Malphite.late_game: He outscales as a teamfighter. You're a split pusher. Never group.
Malphite.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Avoid grouped fights.
Malphite.scaling: Malphite outscales as a teamfighter. You're a split pusher.
Malphite.positioning: Trade hard early. Don't let him scale into teamfights.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle farms early with Q. She's weak to all-ins. Your combos destroy her early.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her W healing — focus her down before she heals. Her range increases with levels.
Kayle.early_game: She's incredibly weak early. Your combos are devastating. You should kill her.
Kayle.mid_game: She scales with items. Your split push is strong. Avoid grouped fights.
Kayle.late_game: She outscales dramatically. You must win early.
Kayle.win_condition: Kill her early. Get a lead. Roam and split push.
Kayle.scaling: Kayle outscales dramatically. You must win early.
Kayle.positioning: Rush her early with combos. Don't let her scale.

Sejuani.trading_pattern: Sejuani is tanky but slow. Your burst is stronger. Look for combo windows.
Sejuani.ability_to_dodge: Her R stun — move sideways to avoid her engage. It stuns and deals damage.
Sejuani.early_game: Trade hard with your combos. She's tanky but has lower damage.
Sejuani.mid_game: Her R engage is powerful grouped. Look for side lane opportunities.
Sejuani.late_game: She outscales as a tank. You're a split pusher. Avoid grouped fights.
Sejuani.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Avoid grouped fights.
Sejuani.scaling: Sejuani outscales as a tank. You're a split pusher.
Sejuani.positioning: Trade hard early. Avoid her R engage grouped.

Varus.trading_pattern: Varus pokes with Q and applies on-hit stacks. His poke is safe from range. Trade when Q is down.
Varus.ability_to_dodge: His R chain reaction — dodge by moving sideways. If hit, the chain spreads.
Varus.early_game: Varus outpokes. Your combos are strong when you land them. Look for openings.
Varus.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His poke is still relevant. Avoid grouped fights.
Varus.late_game: He outscales as a poke champion. You're a split pusher. Avoid grouped fights.
Varus.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Avoid grouped fights.
Varus.scaling: Varus outscales as a poke champion. You're a split pusher.
Varus.positioning: Dodge his Q by moving sideways. Rush him when possible.

Vayne.trading_pattern: Vayne's range and tumble let her kite. She applies true damage slowly. Extended trades favor her.
Vayne.ability_to_dodge: Her E condemn stun — move away from walls. Never stand near walls.
Vayne.early_game: Vayne is weak early. Your combos are strong. Look for kills early.
Vayne.mid_game: She scales with items. Your split push is strong. Avoid grouped fights.
Vayne.late_game: She outscales as a hypercarry. You must win early.
Vayne.win_condition: Kill her early. Get a lead. Roam and split push.
Vayne.scaling: Vayne outscales as a hypercarry. You must win early.
Vayne.positioning: Stay away from walls. Rush her early.

Teemo.trading_pattern: Teemo pokes from range safely. He's invisible in shrooms. Your combos are strong but hard to execute.
Teemo.ability_to_dodge: His Q blind — move unpredictably. When blinded, you can't combo.
Teemo.early_game: Teemo pokes safely. Your combos are strong but risky. Look for kill windows.
Teemo.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His shrooms are annoying. Avoid grouped fights.
Teemo.late_game: He splits and shrooms. You're a better split pusher. Avoid grouped fights.
Teemo.win_condition: Look for early kill windows. Roam and split push. Avoid shrooms.
Teemo.scaling: You outscale through split push. Teemo through shrooms.
Teemo.positioning: Rush him when possible. Avoid shrooms and poke.

Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q outer ring applies bleed. Extended trades favor him. Trade short when Q is down.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q bleed — walk at him to avoid outer ring. Your combos burst him fast.
Darius.early_game: Trade short when his Q is down. Your combos are strong.
Darius.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His ult execute is dangerous. Avoid grouped fights.
Darius.late_game: He outscales slightly. You're a split pusher. Avoid grouped fights.
Darius.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Avoid grouped fights.
Darius.scaling: Darius outscales slightly. You're a split pusher.
Darius.positioning: Walk at him to avoid Q outer ring. Trade when Q is down.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q swings deal high damage and heal him. Your burst matches his. Trade when Q is down.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q swings — dodge by moving perpendicular. Avoid standing in swings.
Aatrox.early_game: Trade hard when his Q is down. Your combos are strong.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His healing is strong. Avoid grouped fights.
Aatrox.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Trade when Q is down.
Aatrox.positioning: Dodge his Q swings by moving sideways. Trade when Q is down.

Gwen.trading_pattern: Gwen has short range but burst damage. Your range advantage helps. Trade when her abilities are down.
Gwen.ability_to_dodge: Her E snip — move sideways to dodge. She locks you into a small zone.
Gwen.early_game: Trade hard when her abilities are down. Your combos are strong.
Gwen.mid_game: Your split push is strong. Her items help her scale. Avoid grouped fights.
Gwen.late_game: She outscales as a split pusher. You're equal. Depends on game flow.
Gwen.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Trade when abilities are down.
Gwen.scaling: Gwen outscales slightly as a split pusher. You're equal.
Gwen.positioning: Trade when her abilities are down. Avoid her snip zone.

Sion.trading_pattern: Sion has high poke Q. Your burst combos are stronger. Look for combo windows.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: His Q poke — move left or right to dodge. Back away from the charge.
Sion.early_game: Trade hard with your combos. Sion's poke is manageable.
Sion.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His teamfight is powerful. Avoid grouped fights.
Sion.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're a split pusher. Avoid grouped fights.
Sion.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Trade when possible.
Sion.scaling: Sion outscales as a tank. You're a split pusher.
Sion.positioning: Trade hard early. Avoid his Q by moving sideways.

K'Sante.trading_pattern: K'Sante has strong poke and all-in. His E engage is powerful. Trade when abilities are down.
K'Sante.ability_to_dodge: His E lunge — move sideways when charging. His R pulls you into him.
K'Sante.early_game: Trade hard when his abilities are down. Your combos are strong.
K'Sante.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His engage is powerful. Avoid grouped fights.
K'Sante.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're a split pusher. Avoid grouped fights.
K'Sante.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Trade when abilities are down.
K'Sante.scaling: K'Sante outscales as a tank. You're a split pusher.
K'Sante.positioning: Trade when his abilities are down. Avoid his E lunge.

Gnar.trading_pattern: Gnar mini-form pokes early. Mega all-in is oppressive. Trade hard when he's mini.
Gnar.ability_to_dodge: His mega transformation — brace for impact. His R knockback is strong.
Gnar.early_game: Trade hard when he's mini. Your combos are strong early.
Gnar.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His form cycling is unpredictable. Avoid grouped fights.
Gnar.late_game: He outscales as a teamfighter. You're a split pusher. Avoid grouped fights.
Gnar.win_condition: Get a lead early. Target him when mini. Roam and split push.
Gnar.scaling: Gnar outscales as a teamfighter. You're a split pusher.
Gnar.positioning: Target him when mini. Avoid when mega. Trade when weakened.

Shen.trading_pattern: Shen's E taunt is annoying but your combos burst him. Play around his E cooldown.
Shen.ability_to_dodge: His E taunt — move perpendicular to his charge. Back away when he walks forward.
Shen.early_game: Trade hard when his E is down. Your combos are strong.
Shen.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His ult helps his team. Avoid grouped fights.
Shen.late_game: You're both split-push focused. Even matchup late.
Shen.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Trade when E is down.
Shen.scaling: Even — both scale as split pushers.
Shen.positioning: Trade when E is down. Move perpendicular to avoid taunt.

Ornn.trading_pattern: Ornn is tanky but slow. Your combos burst him. Look for combo windows.
Ornn.ability_to_dodge: His R volcanic rupture — move sideways. It doesn't prevent your combos.
Ornn.early_game: Trade hard with your combos. Ornn's damage is low early.
Ornn.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His upgrades help him scale. Avoid grouped fights.
Ornn.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're a split pusher. Avoid grouped fights.
Ornn.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Trade hard early.
Ornn.scaling: Ornn outscales as a tank. You're a split pusher.
Ornn.positioning: Trade hard early. Don't let him scale.

Yasuo.trading_pattern: Yasuo dashes through minions with E. Your range advantage helps. Trade hard when E is down.
Yasuo.ability_to_dodge: His E-Q combo chain — move away from minions. Windwall blocks your projectiles.
Yasuo.early_game: Trade hard when his E is down. Your combos are strong.
Yasuo.mid_game: Your split push is strong. His split push is relevant. Avoid grouped fights.
Yasuo.late_game: He outscales as a split pusher. You're equal. Depends on game flow.
Yasuo.win_condition: Get a lead early. Roam and split push. Trade when E is down.
Yasuo.scaling: Even — both scale as split pushers.
Yasuo.positioning: Stay away from minions to prevent E dashes. Trade when E is down.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora parries your Q. She dashes in with Q. Play around her Riposte carefully.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her Riposte — bait it with a fake ability, then go in for real. She blocks burst if predictable.
Fiora.early_game: Trade hard but don't be predictable. Fiora is dangerous but beatable.
Fiora.mid_game: Your split push is strong. She splits well but you match. Fight when favorable.
Fiora.late_game: She's a better 1v1 duelist. You can still split push and duel if ahead.
Fiora.win_condition: Get a lead early. Unpredictable combos. Roam and split push.
Fiora.scaling: Fiora outscales as a duelist. You must stay ahead.
Fiora.positioning: Be unpredictable with your combos. Don't overextend alone.
